[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 01001000 2
4 11001010 4
5 10001010 3
6 00110001 3
7 01110111 6

01 10 10001010 3 match 5
12 21 00000000 a match 0 1 2
23 32 00110001 3 match 6
34 43 00010100 2
45 54 00000000 a match 0 1 2
56 65 01000000 1
67 76 01001000 2 match 3
70 07 01001000 2 match 3

02 20 00000000 a match 0 1 2
13 31 00000010 1
24 42 00010000 1
35 53 01000011 3
46 64 00000000 a match 0 1 2
57 75 01000000 1
60 06 01001000 2 match 3
71 17 00001000 1

03 30 01000010 2
14 41 00000000 a match 0 1 2
25 52 00000001 1
36 63 01100000 2
47 74 00000100 1
50 05 01000010 2
61 16 00001000 1
72 27 00000000 a match 0 1 2

04 40 00000000 a match 0 1 2
15 51 00000010 1
26 62 00100000 1
37 73 01000100 2
[completion]
